name: Ranger
summary: Wilderness warrior. Excels at tracking, two-weapon fighting or archery, and hunting specific foes.

class_features.name: Favored Enemy
class_features.summary: Choose one creature type. +2 to Bluff, Knowledge, Perception, Sense Motive, Survival vs that type, and +2 to weapon attack and damage rolls vs that type.

class_features.name: Track
class_features.summary: +1/2 level on Survival checks to follow tracks.

class_features.name: Wild Empathy
class_features.summary: Roll 1d20 + class level + Cha to influence an animal's attitude.
